title: CSD-Based Model Routing Simulation: Downstream Value Quantification
summary: Demo notebook reproducing the CSD-based model routing Monte Carlo simulation. Loads pre-processed per-model per-level accuracy and CSD indicator data for arithmetic (3 LLMs, 24 levels) and graph coloring (3 LLMs, 20 levels) tasks. Compares 4 routing policies (always-cheap, always-capable, CSD-monitored, oracle) across 5 batch sizes x 3 difficulty distributions x 100 MC runs each. Uses full original parameters (1000 queries/run, 100 MC runs). Produces summary tables and cost-vs-accuracy visualizations. Headline: CSD routing achieves ~59% of oracle improvement at ~63% of capable cost. Runs in ~31s.
